description: Template passes regression gate with 5 policy rules and a minor wording improvement candidate — learning candidate.

input.candidateChangeDescription: Minor clarification of boundary note wording; no semantic change.

expected.reason: Regression gate passed; candidate change is minor and non-semantic. Suitable for quality baseline tracking.

description: Template passes regression gate with 8 policy rules and no proposed change — watch_only for ongoing quality monitoring.

expected.reason: No change proposed; regression passed. Template is in stable monitoring state.

description: Template passes regression gate with 3 rules and a structural clarification candidate — learning candidate.

input.candidateChangeDescription: Reorder two boundary notes for improved readability; no behavior change.

expected.reason: Regression gate passed; change is structural and non-behavioral. Good candidate for template quality improvement tracking.

description: High policy rule count template passes regression gate — watch_only given complexity of rule set.

input.candidateChangeDescription: Add one additional non-commitment note to the bottom of the template.

expected.reason: 20 policy rules introduce complexity; even with a regression pass, additional monitoring is prudent before advancement.

description: Simple template with 2 rules passes regression gate and no change — clean learning candidate for minimal template study.

input.candidateChangeDescription: No change; verifying gate coverage for minimal template type.

expected.reason: Minimal rule set with regression pass and no change. Clean coverage case for simple template type.

description: NEGATIVE: Regression gate failed — template change cannot proceed without human review.

input.candidateChangeDescription: Modify commitment boundary wording to be less restrictive.

expected.reason: Regression gate failed on a commitment boundary wording change. Human review mandatory before any template change proceeds.

description: NEGATIVE: Candidate change description indicates production prompt modification — rejected as boundary violation.

input.candidateChangeDescription: Directly update the production prompt template with new instruction set.

expected.reason: Candidate description implies direct production prompt modification, which violates the no-production-prompt-change boundary. Rejected unconditionally.

description: NEGATIVE: Zero policy rules with regression failure and no change description — rejected as malformed fixture.

expected.reason: Zero policy rules, empty change description, no evidence refs, and regression failure. Malformed input rejected.
